title: [FIRRTL] sizeof intrinsic doesn't work on bundles
body:
Consider this IR:
```
  firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
    firrtl.module @Foo(in %i: !firrtl.bundle<a: clock>, out %out: !firrtl.uint<32>) attributes {convention = #firrtl<convention scalarized>} {
      %0 = firrtl.int.sizeof %i : (!firrtl.bundle<a: clock>) -> !firrtl.uint<32>
      firrtl.strictconnect %out, %0 : !firrtl.uint<32>
    }
  }
```

(produced from:
```
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit Foo :
  public module Foo:
    input i : { a : Clock }
    output out : UInt<32>

    connect out, intrinsic(circt_sizeof : UInt<32>, i)
```
)

Feeding into firtool produces:

```
intrinsic_sizeof.fir:7:18: error: SizeOf should have been resolved.
    connect out, intrinsic(circt_sizeof : UInt<32>, i)
                 ^
intrinsic_sizeof.fir:7:18: note: see current operation: %3 = "firrtl.int.sizeof"(%2) : (!firrtl.bundle<a: clock>) -> !firrtl.uint<32>
intrinsic_sizeof.fir:7:18: error: 'firrtl.int.sizeof' op LowerToHW couldn't handle this operation
    connect out, intrinsic(circt_sizeof : UInt<32>, i)
                 ^
intrinsic_sizeof.fir:7:18: note: see current operation: %3 = "firrtl.int.sizeof"(%2) : (!firrtl.bundle<a: clock>) -> !firrtl.uint<32>
```

cc #6926
